args.body:
Dear Daniel Lee,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received a referral from Dr. Priya Nair. Child at Northside Pediatrics for Emma Lee. DOB regarding a speech articulation evaluation.

We are pleased to confirm that Emma Lee. DOB's Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO insurance is active and in-network with our practice. Please note that a $30 copay applies per visit, and prior authorization will be required before services begin — our team will take care of initiating that process.

A staff member will be in touch shortly to confirm a specific appointment time that fits your after-school Tuesday or Thursday availability.

In the meantime, you can reach us at any time with questions. We look forward to welcoming Emma Lee. DOB to Cedar Kids Therapy!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Staff to confirm the pending-review hold for Thursday 2026-05-01 at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen (SLP), initiate prior authorization with BCBS, and send the drafted welcome/confirmation email to the family. Also create the new patient record.

items.decision_rationale: This is a routine new SLP referral from Northside Pediatrics for a pediatric articulation concern. The patient was not found in the system (new patient). Blue Cross Blue Shield PPO was verified as in-network and active (copay $30, prior auth required). Per insurance policy, in-network referrals may proceed to slot-finding and a pending-review hold. The best slot matching the family's stated preference (after school, Tuesday/Thursday) is Thursday 2026-05-01 at 3:30 PM with Maya Chen, MS CCC-SLP — a pending-review hold has been placed for staff to confirm. No safeguarding indicators, no language access needs (English), and no billing barrier. Prior authorization must be initiated before the appointment is confirmed. Urgency is P2 (routine intake).

extracted_intake.diagnosis_or_concern: Speech therapy evaluation requested; parent incidentally disclosed child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends' — potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving concern

args.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been "getting rough with him" — potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving disclosure triggering mandated-reporter review.

args.notes: Voicemail received 2026-04-27 19:43. Parent Maria Gomez called to request a speech/SLP evaluation for son Leo, age 6. During the message, parent stated the child "has been more clingy since his dad started getting rough with him during weekends." This constitutes a potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving disclosure and requires same-hour mandated-reporter review by the clinical lead. Do NOT conduct scheduling or intake until this safeguarding matter is reviewed. Parent callback number: 555-0102. Escalation ID: esc_01ksgawxe9d73ssk87r5z51y0k.
args.title: P0 Safeguarding Review — Potential Physical Harm Disclosure (Leo)

args.body: Hi, this message is for Maria Gomez. Thank you so much for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be calling you back at 555-0102 as soon as possible. We want to make sure we give you and your son the attention you deserve. Please know we are here to support your family. We look forward to speaking with you soon.

items.recommended_next_action: Clinical lead must conduct same-hour mandated-reporter review of the safeguarding disclosure before any scheduling or intake steps are taken. Staff should call Maria Gomez at 555-0102 with a neutral, supportive callback only after clinical lead guidance is received.
items.draft_reply: Hi, this message is for Maria Gomez. Thank you so much for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy about Leo. We received your voicemail and a member of our team will be calling you back at 555-0102 as soon as possible. We want to make sure we give you and your son the attention you deserve. Please know we are here to support your family. We look forward to speaking with you soon.

escalation.reason: Parent disclosed that the child's father has been 'getting rough with him during weekends' — potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving, triggering mandated-reporter duties. Requires same-hour clinical lead review.

items.decision_rationale: The voicemail contains a direct parental disclosure that the child's father has been "getting rough with him during weekends," which constitutes a potential physical abuse/unsafe caregiving disclosure under Cedar Kids safeguarding policy. Per policy, this is an automatic P0: the item was immediately escalated to the clinical lead (esc_01ksgawxe9d73ssk87r5z51y0k), a same-hour clinical lead task was created (task_01ksgax7h83rvqp7s8c27syvst), and only a neutral, non-investigative acknowledgement was drafted for staff review. No scheduling, clinical advice, or probing questions were included in the draft. The underlying SLP evaluation request is noted but cannot be progressed until the safeguarding review is complete. Patient not found in the system — new family.

args.notes: New OT referral received via fax from Westside Pediatrics (Dr. Helena Yu. Child). Patient: Owen Brooks. DOB, DOB 2020-02-11. Parent: Rachel Brooks, phone 555-0103, email rachel.brooks@example.com. Insurance: Kaiser HMO, Member ID KSR-4471. Billing system confirms OUT_OF_NETWORK. A benefits conversation is required before any slot can be held. Family preference is morning appointments.
args.title: Out-of-network benefits conversation – Owen Brooks. DOB (Kaiser HMO)

args.body:
Dear Rachel Brooks,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy regarding an OT evaluation for Owen Brooks. DOB. We have received the referral from Dr. Helena Yu. Child at Westside Pediatrics.

After reviewing your insurance information, we found that Kaiser HMO is currently not in our network. Before we can schedule an appointment, we would need to have a brief benefits conversation with you to explore your out-of-network coverage options and discuss any potential costs.

A member of our billing team will be reaching out to you shortly at 555-0103 or rachel.brooks@example.com to walk you through the next steps.

We look forward to supporting Owen Brooks. DOB and appreciate your patience.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team should contact Rachel Brooks today (2026-04-28) to conduct a benefits conversation about out-of-network coverage before any appointment is scheduled. No slot should be held until coverage is resolved.

args.title: Prior auth required — PT eval, Mateo Ramirez (Aetna PPO)

args.body:
Dear Carla,

Thank you for reaching out to Cedar Kids Therapy! We received your request for a PT evaluation for Mateo Ramirez and are happy to help.

We have located Mateo Ramirez's record and confirmed that your Aetna PPO coverage is active and in-network with us (copay: $30/visit). Please note that your plan requires a prior authorization before the evaluation can be confirmed — our billing team will reach out to you shortly to assist with that step.

In the meantime, we've placed a tentative hold on the following appointment for your review:

• Provider: Priya Shah, PT, DPT
• Date/Time: Wednesday, April 29, 2026 at 1:00 PM

This hold is pending staff confirmation and prior authorization approval — it is not yet a confirmed booking. A member of our team will be in touch soon to finalize everything.

If you have any questions or need to discuss a different time, please don't hesitate to reply to this email or call us at your convenience.

We look forward to working with Mateo Ramirez!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Billing team to pursue prior authorization with Aetna PPO (auth_required=true) today; front desk to confirm or adjust the pending hold (Priya Shah PT, 2026-04-29 1:00 PM) once auth is cleared. Also follow up to obtain the referral document from the pediatrician.

items.decision_rationale: This is a routine new PT referral from an established patient's family. Insurance verified in-network (Aetna PPO, active), but prior authorization is required — billing task created for same-day action. A slot hold was placed for the soonest available PT evaluation slot (Priya Shah, 2026-04-29 1:00 PM) as a reviewable recommendation only; no appointment is confirmed. P2 (default) urgency is appropriate — no time-critical indicators beyond the auth needing prompt attention.

args.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thank you for reaching out about Ava! We're so glad you got in touch.

Our team isn't able to give clinical guidance over messages, but we absolutely want to make sure you get the right information. The best next step would be to schedule a brief speech-language screening or consultation with one of our SLPs — that way, a clinician can review Ava's speech directly and give you personalised guidance.

If you'd like to move forward, just reply here and we'll be happy to walk you through the intake process and find a convenient time. There's no obligation to commit to ongoing services just by coming in for a screening.

Looking forward to hearing from you!

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Staff to review draft reply and send via portal, offering Ava a speech-language screening or consultation with an SLP. No clinical guidance should be given over message per policy.

items.decision_rationale: Parent is asking whether their 4-year-old's difficulty with R sounds is developmentally normal — a clinical question that staff and automated systems are prohibited from answering over message per Cedar Kids policy. No safeguarding concerns, no imminent harm, no same-day scheduling urgency. Patient search returned no match, so Ava appears to be a new patient. Urgency is P2 (routine). Draft reply acknowledges the question, explains the no-clinical-advice-over-message policy, and offers a speech-language screening as the appropriate next step. Insurance and DOB are not yet collected; those will be needed if the family chooses to proceed with intake.

args.title: Incomplete referral – Sam Taylor (SLP) from Lakeview Pediatrics

args.body:
Dear Dr. Omar Keene. Child and Lakeview Pediatrics team,

Thank you for the referral of Sam Taylor. DOB for Speech-Language Pathology evaluation (concern: speech delay). We are unable to proceed with scheduling until the following required information is provided:

1. Child's date of birth
2. Parent/guardian name and contact information (phone and/or email)
3. Insurance payer/plan name
4. Insurance member ID

Please resubmit the referral or fax the missing details to our office at your earliest convenience so we can move forward promptly for this family.

Thank you for your partnership in care.

Cedar Kids Therapy – Intake Team
args.recipient: Lakeview Pediatrics / Dr. Omar Keene. Child

args.body:
Hola Ana Lopez. Llamo, le llamamos de Cedar Kids Therapy. Gracias por comunicarse con nosotros.

Recibimos su mensaje para solicitar una evaluación de habla para Isabella Lopez. Hemos verificado su cobertura de Medicaid y todo está activo.

Tenemos un horario disponible con nuestra terapeuta bilingüe (español/inglés), Lucía Morales, MA CCC-SLP:

• Jueves, 30 de abril a las 11:00 a.m.

Si ese horario no le conviene, también hay disponibilidad el lunes 4 de mayo a las 2:00 p.m.

Un miembro de nuestro equipo la llamará al 555-0107 para confirmar la cita y explicarle los próximos pasos. Si tiene preguntas, no dude en comunicarse con nosotros.

¡Esperamos conocer a Isabella Lopez pronto!

args.title: Same-day OT cancellation – Noah Patel (today 3pm)

args.body:
Hi Anita Patel,

Thank you for letting us know so quickly — we're sorry to hear Noah isn't feeling well, and we hope he feels better soon!

We've noted the cancellation of today's 3pm OT appointment. A member of our front desk team will be in touch shortly (by phone at 555-0108 or reply to this email) to find a reschedule time that works best for your family.

If you have any questions in the meantime, please don't hesitate to reach out.

Warm regards,
Cedar Kids Therapy

items.recommended_next_action: Front desk to release today's 3pm OT slot and call/email the family today to confirm a reschedule. One candidate OT slot identified (James Owens, OTR/L – 2026-05-05 at 10:00am) for staff to review and offer the family.

items.decision_rationale: This is a same-day cancellation of an existing OT appointment for an established patient (pat_noah_patel), received the morning of the appointment. Urgency is P1 because the 3pm slot needs to be released/backfilled today. No safeguarding concerns. No insurance action needed (reschedule of existing patient). Policy confirms same-day illness cancellations should be handled promptly and makeup availability requires staff review. A front_desk task was created for same-day action. One candidate reschedule slot was surfaced for staff review (not held — human confirmation required). Draft reply acknowledges the cancellation warmly without clinical commentary.
